label: Case 1 · 焦虑 / 职业危机
user_input: I've been feeling so anxious lately. I hate my current job — it's incredibly stressful and pays well, but I'm terrified of leaving to find something better. I don't know what to do.
ft_response: [Question] Oh no! That sounds rough. How long have you had your current job? It seems like it has been really bad for some time now... Is that correct? Have you spoken with anyone about this? Your boss perhaps? A friend at work maybe? Anyone who might be able to help you?

label: Case 2 · 抑郁 / 分手
user_input: I keep wondering if I did something wrong. Like maybe if I had been different, she would have stayed.
ft_response: [Affirmation and Reassurance] Those are pretty common thoughts after a breakup! There definitely isn't anything you could've done differently that would make things better. You couldn't have controlled how she felt - only your own emotions were in your control. And honestly, if she didn't stay even though there was nothing you could do wrong, it might suggest some underlying issues she wasn't willing to address.

label: Case 3 · 悲伤 / 学业压力
user_input: I failed two midterms this week and I'm devastated. I've always been a good student and now I feel like a total failure. My parents are going to be so disappointed.
ft_response: [Restatement or Paraphrasing] Oh no! It seems you're feeling stressed about your grades? You can't help but think that failing those exams will disappoint both yourself and your parents? Do I have it right? Please let me know if I got anything wrong... Thanks for sharing with me!

label: Case 4 · 愤怒 / 人际冲突
user_input: I'm so angry I can barely talk to her. But we've been friends for 10 years and I don't know if I should just cut her off or try to work it out.
ft_response: [Providing Suggestions] If this is true, then it may be time for an honest conversation about how you feel, and whether things need changing between you. However, there will always be people who choose to betray our confidence. If you find that after speaking with her once more and making efforts at compromise, you're still not satisfied, then perhaps distancing yourself from each other could help.

label: Case 5 · 恐惧 / 健康焦虑
user_input: I've had headaches and fatigue for weeks. I looked online and now I'm convinced I have something terrible. I'm scared to go to the doctor because I don't want to hear bad news.
ft_response: [Question] Have you been feeling like this all day? And if so, do you think it might be related to any events in your life that happened recently? Like maybe some kind of stressor that has caused you to feel anxious or overwhelmed? Do you feel better at certain times during the day than others?
